headline: Elliott Pressure And New CEO Test Norwegian Cruise Line Profitability
summary: Elliott Investment Management is pushing for board changes at Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NYSE:NCLH), criticizing years of execution missteps. The company has appointed John Chidsey as CEO amid management turnover and efforts to tighten coordination and accountability. Escalating geopolitical conflict in the Middle East is disrupting cruise itineraries, affecting travel plans and fuel costs for NCLH. Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings, which operates a global cruise business under the...
